columns.name: initiated_by
columns.comment: Technical actor/user who started the import job. Used for audit and execution trace.

columns.name: owner_identity_id
columns.comment: Business owner/responsible identity for the import context. May differ from initiated_by.

columns.name: club_core_tenant_id
columns.comment: Helper tenant reference derived from club_core_id to enforce tenant-context alignment without triggers.

columns.name: club_core_tenant_id
columns.comment: Helper tenant reference derived from club_core_id to enforce tenant-context alignment without triggers.

usageGuidance.goal: Use this JSON to derive source-of-truth tables, join paths, field scopes, securityContext, view/RPC candidates and the SQL reference for a mask or process.
rules: Prefer base tables with the highest sourceOfTruthScore as source-of-truth candidates.
Use joins from the join graph first; only invent manual joins when no FK edge exists.
Treat relations with tenant_id, club_id or canonical_membership_id as club-scoped candidates.
Treat relations with identity_id but no club/tenant key as global_user candidates.
Treat audit/history/log relations as append-only support structures, not primary truth by default.
Carry inferred securityContext into mask authoring; JSON must not invent club or tenant security on its own.
For rpc and edge-function candidates, require serverValidated = true and derive tenant or membership checks from the relation securityContext.
